description_long: This is a tall, cylindrical bottle of Bruno Banani shampoo, designed for men, with a sleek, modern appearance. The bottle is predominantly black with a matte finish and features a slightly tapered body that widens toward the base. The front label displays the brand name 'bruno banani' in bold white text, along with product details and a 'NEW' badge. The back of the bottle contains detailed product information, usage instructions, and a barcode. The cap is integrated and appears to be a flip-top style, seamlessly blending with the bottle's silhouette. The overall design is minimalistic, with no decorative graphics aside from the text and logo.
description: A tall, sleek black Bruno Banani shampoo bottle with a matte finish, bold white branding, and a flip-top cap. The design is minimalistic and modern, with detailed labeling on the back.
description_view_0: The front view shows the main label with the 'bruno banani' logo, product name, and a 'NEW' badge.
description_view_1: The side view reveals the bottle's slim, cylindrical profile with no visible labeling or features.
description_view_2: The back view displays detailed product information, instructions, and a barcode in white text.
description_view_3: The opposite side view again shows the bottle's slim profile, similar to view 1, with no visible labeling.
attribute_label_text: NEW bruno banani NOT FOR EVERYBODY MAN HAIR & BODY SHAMPOO 250 ml e 8.4 FL.OZ.
attribute_bottle_silhouette: tall and cylindrical with a slightly tapered body and rounded shoulders
